title: Mineguns
body:
Mineguns Mod


This modification adds a few firearms to minecraft, which will enhance your minecraft experience, making the game easier and more fun, since you have the ability to kill enemies from a distance. 

The modification is a branch of my larger mod - MCPF Mod. It caters to players who enjoy firearms in a Minecraft-style and don't want the other features offered by MCPF. Just to add, Mineguns was released before MCPF Mod because I wanted to release something while I was still obtaining permissions from skin creators and refining mechanics for MCPF



[Mineguns - All weapons showcase](https://youtu.be/FEM9fYcRHgQ?si=a7fqTQ0ahW8U8IVI)

[Mineguns mod - Crafting, firing and upgrading](https://youtu.be/HwjdnUw7yMw?si=7ZSGeatu7DTJswzN)

[Minigun Guide](https://youtu.be/Rc8JCokAUzg?si=YANWSn5OOPH3_qsh)


# This Mod adds a few weapons:

Ak-47

Colt1911

Mp40

Spas12

Rocket launcher

Double-barreled shotgun

Minigun

Barret .50

M9 Bayonet

German granade

Landmine & Antitank mine

AA12

Crossbow

AWP

Panzerfaust 3

M1921 Thompson

Stun gun

Desert Eagle



**You can craft those guns in a machine called "Fabricator" you can upgrade modules of your weapons, making them deal more damage, have less recoil, and have faster reload times**

The mod also features two vehicles, namely the **Leopard 2A4** and **Tiger I**. These tanks can drive, shoot, be repaired using a welding torch, and can be destroyed if damaged too much. To connect the turret with the hull, you need to make it fall onto the hull, and then they will be joined

To fire from these tanks, you first need to load ammunition into them. To do this, simply click with the projectile in hand on the tank's hull. Then, you need to get into the tank and use the arrow keys to select the projectile you want to fire.

To fill the tank with fuel, you need to click on its hull while holding Engine Oil in your hand

You can produce gasoline, oil, and engine oil in the refinery


# Big thanks to the creators who allowed me to use their resources:

[Half-Life 2 Resistance Crossbow](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/half-life-2-resistance-crossbow-4212392/)

[Boevik - Soldier](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/boevik-soldier/)

[Boevik - Juggernaut](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/boevik-juggernaut/)
